title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Shiprocket

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Shiprocket
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shiprocket. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Shiprocket:
Shiprocket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
